title: coaching — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — coach profile / assignment / certification / rating CRUD by admin + HR + branch_manager + coach-self via .own scope. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read for support tooling with PII + hourly-rate redacted.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.viewAny.own
permissions.description: Coach-scoped listing — narrows to the profile linked to the caller's Staff row.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.view.own
permissions.description: Self-view for the coach on their own profile.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.view.rate
permissions.description: View hourly_rate_cents + rate_currency. Distinct permission — regulated_financial-tier.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.view.pii
permissions.description: View bio + photo_url_signed at full resolution. Coaches see their own; admins see all.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.create
permissions.description: Elevate a Staff row to Coach.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.update
permissions.description: Update profile fields (primary_sport, specializations, availability). Excludes hourly_rate (dedicated permission) + verified_by_admin_at (dedicated /verify route).

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.update.own
permissions.description: Coach updates their own bio, availability, is_accepting_new_athletes, photo_url_signed. Rate + verification remain admin-only.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.update.rate
permissions.description: Update hourly_rate_cents + rate_currency. Regulated_financial-tier permission.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete the coaching profile. Coach remains as Staff.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.verify
permissions.description: Admin verifies a coaching profile. Sets verified_by_admin_at.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.deactivate
permissions.description: Flip is_active=false. Cascades to open assignments.

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.reactivate
permissions.description: Flip is_active=true (re-verification required).

permissions.name: coaching_profiles.export.own
permissions.description: Coach export their own record (CCPA compliance).

permissions.name: coach_assignments.viewAny.own
permissions.description: Coach-scoped listing — narrows to assignments on the caller's coaching_profile.

permissions.name: coach_assignments.create
permissions.description: Create a CoachAssignment.

permissions.name: coach_assignments.delete
permissions.description: Cancel an assignment (soft-delete).

permissions.name: coach_assignments.end
permissions.description: Set end_date on an active assignment.

permissions.name: coach_certifications.create.own
permissions.description: Coach captures their own certifications.

permissions.name: coach_certifications.verify
permissions.description: Admin verifies a certification.

permissions.name: coach_certifications.expiring
permissions.description: Read expiring-cert compliance surface.

permissions.name: coach_skill_ratings.viewAny.own
permissions.description: Coach sees ratings on themselves.

permissions.name: coach_skill_ratings.create
permissions.description: Record a rating on a coach. Self-rating refused at the observer.

permissions.name: coach_skill_ratings.update
permissions.description: Update an existing rating's value.

permissions.name: coaches.report
permissions.description: Generate per-branch roster reports.

permissions.name: platform.coaching_profiles.view
permissions.description: PII + hourly-rate always redacted on platform reads.
